Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x9C00 "BOUNCEIT-9C00" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Bounce It.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $9C00 which: 1. Calls the init subroutine at $0F09 from the original game code 2. Executes the RUN command to start the game program
Note: to dump the game, set a breakpoint at $0F09
